engine.description: The database engine to use, such as 'mysql', 'postgres', or 'oracle'.

engine_latest_version.description: Set to true if you want to use the latest version of the specified database engine.

preferred_engine_versions.description: A list of specific database engine versions you prefer to use.

preferred_instance_classes.description: A list of preferred RDS instance classes, such as 'db.t2.micro' or 'db.m5.large'.
